title: 2 Pack Shelf Brackets 15cm, Heavy Duty Wall Brackets, 75kg Load Capacity, Black Floating Shelf Bracket
features: 【Heavy Duty Shelf Brackets】Shelf brackets is made of heavy duty steel, can support up to 75kg/165lbs.The floating shelf brackets will not bend, 4mm thickness of the shelves brackets rod,ultra strong and durable.Shelf bracket resistant to daily scratches, corrosion and rust, keeping it in its best appearance.

【Real Hidden Brackets】This floating bracket is a hidden design, which will not reveal any extra parts after installation and has a great visual effect.The floating shelf bracket equipped with 4 holes, which can be easily hidden between the bases and firmly fixed to the wall, making the overall shape more beautiful.

【Easy to Install】Boards is not included. Provide the screws needed for different wall mountings. Just follow the steps, this wall mount shelf bracket can be installed even by someone without experience.

【Increase Storage Space】These heavy duty bracket can be used on wooden wall, drywall and hard concrete wall. Our brackets heavy duty add space to store objects in your area and keep everything organized. For larger projects, multiple sets can be used to build additional shelves.

【Multipurpose】Widely used in living room, kitchens, bedrooms, restaurants, utility room, laundry room, garages, storage room, offices, cafes, shops and other places. Used to support partitions, bookshelf boards, display boards, decorative racks, wooden boards, etc., The best choice to make full use of space!
description: Product Description Sturdy shelf bracket, made of thick cast iron for high load-bearing capacity and durability. Stylish design complements any décor, enhancing space cleanliness and aesthetics. Ideal for living rooms, studies, kitchens, bathrooms, and offices. The edges are designed to be smooth and rounded, preventing hand injuries during use and enhancing your overall experience. Featuring high-strength screws and bolts tailored to diverse wall types, ensuring enhanced stability. Versatile Shelving Solution See More
